tasks.subject: Task 1: SDK — IPC channel + API type
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Declare authoringExportPdf channel and exportPresentationPdf on ToolboxApi, rebuild SDK.

**Files:** packages/sdk/src/ipc.ts:28, packages/sdk/src/api.ts:99

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/sdk/src/ipc.ts", "packages/sdk/src/api.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @openappstore/sdk build && grep -q 'authoring.exportPdf' packages/sdk/dist/ipc.js && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["IPC.authoringExportPdf added", "API type added", "SDK rebuilt"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Main — exportPresentationPdf in authoring.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render every slide to one-page-per-slide PDF via offscreen window + printToPDF.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/main/authoring.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @openappstore/desktop typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["function exported", "save dialog + cancel", "offscreen render + printToPDF"]}
```
